codeReview.summary: The reviewed commit implements the T1 scaffold requirements: package metadata and script entrypoint, required module layout, click CLI group with six stub commands printing [TODO] to stderr, global --db context wiring, smoke tests, and README install guidance.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature commit includes many unrelated mission artifacts (including prior .factory/validation files and broad scaffolding) beyond T1 scope, suggesting commit-scope boundaries are not being enforced clearly in shared guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show --stat ef1bb04 lists 103 files, including .factory/validation/** and extensive docs/.factory scaffolding not required by the T1 feature description.

summary: PASS: T1 project scaffold behavior is present in commit ef1bb04 with no functional defects found for required CLI skeleton behavior. One shared-state convention observation was recorded about overly broad commit scope.
